author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Create a new Phase 2 chapter that teaches the VDD/IAR methodology. Source material is the formal VDD spec from the user's gist. The existing curriculum references VDD/IAR throughout but never dedicates a chapter to explaining it. This chapter bridges that gap: it teaches decomposition (chainlink bead-string), the builder-verify-roast loop, adversarial review with fresh context, testing against hard truths (formal verification as a concept), and knowing when you're done (hallucination-based exit). Writing in the existing curriculum voice: conversational, practical, no jargon without explanation. Will also need to create the 02-the-methodology/ directory and update README.md to include Phase 2.
